# Eroll Maxhuni

> Senior Full Stack Developer — 13 years enterprise experience. React, TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, AWS, WebRTC, Expo. Available for remote senior roles and consulting worldwide.

Plain-language AI profile with full tech stack, case studies, and contact details: https://erollmaxhuni.com/llm.txt
